name: slack
title: Slack MCP Server
description: Slack workspace tools for channel discovery, history lookup, posting updates, and drafting messages.

toolDetails.name: list_channels
toolDetails.description: List Slack channels with archive filtering, conversation type filters, and pagination support.

toolDetails.name: fetch_channel_history
toolDetails.description: Fetch recent messages for a channel with cursor pagination and timestamp filters.

toolDetails.name: post_message
toolDetails.description: Post a Slack message to a channel or thread, optionally using a configured default channel.

resourceDetails.name: workspace
resourceDetails.description: Workspace metadata, authenticated bot identity, and configured defaults.

promptDetails.name: compose-update
promptDetails.description: Draft a polished Slack update from structured status inputs.
